แบบขยายครีบ คสล. รอบอาคาร -- RC fin/edge strip detail around building perimeter

warnings: This sheet's content (S0/S0A/S1/SX/SY details, CN-to-beam joint, ขยาย2 expansion, and perimeter fin detail) matches house #4's equivalent S-10 sheet almost exactly in structure -- this design office's standard detail-sheet template.

The 'ขยาย2' (expansion detail 2) element on this sheet is the actual detail referenced by the 'ดูขยาย2' callouts seen on S-04 (floor-1 beam plan), S-05 (floor-2 beam plan), and S-06 (tie-beam plan) for the southern extension near grid A -- but this detail's own content (a small curb/foundation strip at level +0.20m) does not by itself resolve the conflicting extension depths (2.05m/0.40m/0.70m+0.50m) found across those 3 sheets. Still flagged as unresolved pending human review.

S0A's asterisk-marked rebar note (Ø9มม.@0.20ม.*) has no visible footnote elsewhere on this sheet clarifying the asterisk -- consistent with the same unexplained-asterisk pattern seen in house #4's equivalent stair/precast details.
